claim: Uruguay's Budget Law 20.446 replaces the prior tax-holiday regime with a 10-year IRNR option conditional on a real-estate investment over ~USD 2M or ~USD 100k/year in productive funds, effective 2026-01-01.
headline: Uruguay overhauls tax residency with a 10-year non-resident tax option
brief: Budget Law 20.446 replaces Uruguay's old tax-holiday regime with a 10-year non-resident income tax (IRNR) option, now conditional on investing over ~USD 2 million in real estate or ~USD 100,000 a year in productive funds. It takes effect on 1 January 2026.
evidence_quote: Individuals who acquire the status of fiscal resident as of 1 January 2026 may opt to pay the Non-Residents' Income Tax (IRNR) ... for the ten following fiscal years; (a) invest in real estate exceeding UI 12,500,000.

claim: Uzbekistan's Presidential Decree PF-67 grants a five-year residence permit for a USD 250,000 investment payment (USD 150,000 per family member), effective 2025-06-01.
headline: Uzbekistan launches a 5-year residency for a $250,000 investment
brief: Under Presidential Decree PF-67, foreign nationals can obtain a five-year Uzbek residence permit in exchange for a USD 250,000 investment payment, plus USD 150,000 for each family member. The route took effect on 1 June 2025.
evidence_quote: Foreign nationals ... shall be granted a residence permit for a term of 5 years under a simplified procedure in exchange for payments amounting to USD 250,000 and USD 150,000 for each family member.
